title: Classic Console Pack
description: Designed to replicate the original Xbox 360 Edition style with improved texture clarity.
body:
# Welcome to Classic Console Pack
### Based on Minecraft 1.21.8, this modpack aims to faithfully recreate the visual aesthetic of Minecraft Xbox 360 Edition, using the renowned Legacy4J Studios mod as its foundation. Every texture, interface, and detail has been carefully selected to evoke the original console experience.


### **Key Features**
- 🎮 Console-era inspired aesthetics and mechanics.
- 🌍 Optimized multiplayer compatibility for a smooth experience.
- 🧩 Handpicked mods with attention to detail and respect for their authors.
- 🛠️ Simple installation and clear documentation.

![spliscreen on java (with multiple instances)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/048cdc02c4ae10ffa8d92bfa26c6563a03658235.webp)

### Project Philosophy
Classic Console Pack is not just a collection of mods—it’s a celebration of the game’s console history. Every element has been chosen to spark memories, welcome new players, and preserve the authenticity of the original experience.

### **Special Feature:**
_You can assign your preferred "toggle shaders" key to your Xbox controller (or similar) to activate shaders directly in-game. This adds a touch of fantasy without losing the classic essence. The pack also includes by default a set of PBR textures based on the Programmer Art style. Full credit goes to the creator for their excellent work!_

### Xbox 360 Worlds (SOON)
I recommend checking out my tutorial on how to convert a real Xbox 360 world (extracted with Xenia) to Java Edition using JE2BE. It also works for Bedrock. There I explain all the details of the process.

### Credits and Acknowledgments
This modpack does not generate old-style Minecraft worlds. If you wish to recreate those worlds, I recommend using your own mods, as there is currently no fully faithful and stable generator available.

## Disclaimer
### If you are the owner of a mod featured here and are not comfortable with its inclusion in this modpack, please let me know. Your decision will be respected and the necessary steps will be taken.

```
⚠️ Usage Note: This modpack is not recommended for large servers. It is best suited for private servers or small groups of friends, where the nostalgic and controlled experience can be preserved.
```
